description: Seven emergency bug fixes before presentation: $0 KPI values, swapped fields, empty states, horizontal scrolling, and missing task data.

userStories.title: Fix Command Center AR Total showing $0
userStories.description: As a staff member, I want the Command Center 'Total AR Unpaid' KPI card to show the correct AR total so the dashboard is trustworthy at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Command Center KPI card for 'Total AR Unpaid' displays the same value as the AR Dashboard page (over $700K from current data)
The card reads from the same derived total that AR Dashboard already computes correctly in BillingContext
While billing data is loading, the KPI card shows a spinner or loading skeleton — never $0
If billing data fails to load, the card shows an error state — never $0
npm run build passes
npm run lint passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: HomeDashboard now triggers fetchFromSheet on mount with loading spinner and error states for the AR KPI card

userStories.title: Fix DOB and Member ID swapped in client drawer
userStories.description: As a staff member, I want DOB and Member ID to display in the correct fields so I'm not reading the wrong data for a client.
acceptanceCriteria: The Details tab in the client drawer shows DOB in the DOB field and Member ID in the Member ID field
Per the column layout: DOB is column index 12, Member ID is column index 13 — swap the mapping where these two values are read from the sheet row
Verify with at least one client that has both a DOB and a Member ID populated — both appear in the correct field
No other field mappings are affected by this change
npm run build passes
npm run lint passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Swapped ri(12)/ri(13) mapping — actual sheet has Member ID at 12 and DOB at 13

userStories.title: Fix Collections client balances all showing $0
userStories.description: As a staff member, I want each client card in Collections to show their actual outstanding balance so I can prioritize collection efforts.
acceptanceCriteria: Each client card in Collections shows the sum of Billed Amount (column index 5 in 'unpaid at 350pm' tab) for all rows where Client Payment Status = UNPAID, grouped by client name
The balance displayed is non-zero for clients that have unpaid claims in the sheet
Grouping by client name is case-insensitive and handles minor whitespace differences
Dollar amounts are formatted with commas and two decimal places (e.g. $1,234.56)
npm run build passes
npm run lint passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Sum billedAmount instead of clientUnpaid, case-insensitive client grouping, 2-decimal dollar formatting

userStories.title: Fix Staff Registry showing no staff
userStories.description: As a staff member, I want the Staff Registry page to display all clinicians and their NPI data on load.
acceptanceCriteria: Staff Registry fetches from the 'Clinician NPIs' tab of the onboarding Google Sheet (VITE_ONBOARDING_SHEET_ID)
The tab name in the API call is exactly 'Clinician NPIs' (capital C, capital N, with space) — URL-encoded as needed
The sheet ID used is VITE_ONBOARDING_SHEET_ID (not the billing sheet)
Data renders on page load: Clinician Name, Individual NPI, Supervisor Name, Supervisor NPI, Notes
If the tab is missing or fetch fails, show an error message — not a blank page
npm run build passes
npm run lint passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: fetchClinicianNPIs now throws errors instead of silently returning []; StaffRegistry shows error UI with retry

userStories.title: Fix Billing Reports collected amount showing $0
userStories.description: As a staff member, I want the Billing Reports 'Collected' figure to reflect actual paid claims so the report is accurate.
acceptanceCriteria: Collected is calculated as the sum of Billed Amount (column index 5) for rows where Insurance Payment Status = PAID in the 'unpaid at 350pm' tab
The filter uses case-insensitive comparison for the PAID status value
The collected amount is non-zero when paid claims exist in the sheet
Uses the same 'unpaid at 350pm' data already loaded in BillingContext — no additional fetch needed
Dollar amount is formatted consistently with other financial figures in the report
npm run build passes
npm run lint passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Added Collected KPI card summing billedAmount for PAID insurance claims

userStories.title: Fix AR Dashboard horizontal scrolling
userStories.description: As a staff member, I want the AR Dashboard to fit within the viewport without horizontal scrolling.
acceptanceCriteria: AR Dashboard page does not cause horizontal scrolling at any viewport width >= 1024px
All filter dropdowns are constrained with max-width: 100% and overflow: hidden / text-overflow: ellipsis for long option text
All chart containers are constrained to their parent's width — no chart overflows its card
Long clinician names, payer names, or chart labels are truncated with ellipsis rather than expanding the container
Truncated text has a title attribute showing the full value
No content is clipped or inaccessible after the fix
npm run build passes
npm run lint passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Constrained dropdowns, chart, and table with overflow hidden, text truncation with title tooltips

userStories.title: Fix My Tasks showing no tasks
userStories.description: As a staff member, I want the task board to show all tasks when 'All Staff' is selected, including unassigned tasks, so the board is functional.
acceptanceCriteria: When 'All Staff' is selected, ALL tasks are shown regardless of assignee value — including tasks where assignee is null, undefined, or empty string
The 12 diagnostic seed tasks from the spec are present in the task context on app start — verify seed initialization runs
If seed tasks are not loading, fix the initialization code so they are populated into task state on app mount
Individual staff filter still works correctly — shows only tasks assigned to that person
Task count badge in the top bar reflects the correct number of visible tasks
npm run build passes
npm run lint passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Default assignee filter to All Staff so seed tasks and unassigned tasks are visible on load
